title: M0: Scaffold + zero-dep test loop
description: zinc workspace builds; in-repo test harness; green smoke test. aeson verdict: unviable under zinc no-solver model (see spike/aeson-cascade-abandoned).

title: M5: SAP layer (stripToJson + decodeLLM)
description: Tolerant parse (strip code fences/prose) + lenient codecs; messy-input golden tests.

title: M3: Schema + renderSchema + explicit Codec
description: Schema ADT + renderSchema (prompt injection); bidirectional Codec a {schema,decode,encode}; ObjectCodec o a builder (field/object/list'/nullable'/enum/oneOfC/Variant); round-trip tests.

title: M4: Codec.Generic (HasCodec + genericCodec)
description: Opt-in Generics layer producing the same Codec a. HasCodec class + GCodec over Rep; derive round-trip tests (derived == hand-written).

title: M2: Json.Encode + Json.Decode
description: Value encoder + Elm-style Decoder combinators (Functor/Applicative/Monad), crumb error paths + tests.

title: M1: Json.Value + hand-rolled Parse
description: Crucible.Json.Value ADT + recursive-descent parse (zero non-boot deps) + golden tests.

title: Crucible v1: typed prompts + tool calls eDSL
description: Exploration/learning eDSL inspired by BAML + 12-factor-agents. effectful substrate, own schema+SAP parser, Anthropic+scripted+recording interpreters. See docs/specs/2026-06-05-crucible-design.md

title: M10: Eval harness
description: Case/Expectation (Exactly/Predicate/Rubric), Scorer, runEval -> Report (pass-rate/mean/variance/per-case, JSON+table); LLM-as-judge is itself a Codec-backed prompt; run live or vs cassettes.

title: M9: Tools effect + capability typing + example agent
description: effectful Tools effect; per-tool effect rows (authority creep = compile error); one 2-3 tool example agent as dogfood + test/eval target.

title: M7: LLM effect + scripted interpreter loop
description: effectful LLM effect; runLLMScripted; runAgent control loop on canned replies; scripted-loop tests.

title: M6: Decision unification + pure reduce
description: Decision tool answer codec via oneOfC; pure reduce :: AgentState -> Decision -> Step; tests.

title: M8: Anthropic interpreter + recordLLM cassettes
description: runLLMAnthropic (HTTP approach decided here: curl shell-out vs minimal client); recordLLM reinterpret writing cassettes; first live run.
